MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-11-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT NORMAN S.WRIGHT MECHANICAL EQUIPMENT CORPORATION'S MOTION TO STAY LITIGATION IS GRANTED IN PART. THE CASE IS STAYED PENDING COMPLETION OF THE FOUNDATIONAL LITIGATION EXCEPT THAT DISCOVERY MAY PROCEED IN THE INTERIM ON CONDITION THAT THE PARTIES ENTER INTO A PROTECTIVE ORDER PREVENTING DISCLOSURE TO THIRD PARTY OF PRIVILEGED INFORMATION. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

Off Calendar Aug-11-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JONATHAN DUNN OF SEDGWICK LLP, TEL. NO. (949) 567-7817 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT NORMAN S.WRIGHT MECHANICAL EQUIPMENT CORPORATION'S Motion To Stay Litigation IS GRANTED IN PART. THE CASE IS STAYED PENDING COMPLETION OF THE FOUNDATIONAL LITIGATION EXCEPT THAT DISCOVERY MAY PROCEED IN THE INTERIM ON CONDITION THAT THE PARTIES ENTER INTO A PROTECTIVE ORDER PREVENTING DISCLOSURE TO THIRD PARTY OF PRIVILEGED INFORMATION.
